keyInsights: AI handles operations. Humans handle creation.
Storytelling is uniquely human — AI amplifies, doesn't replace.
The butterfly effect of reality can now be visualized and defined.
This is about public benefit, not just personal wealth.
ALTERNATE is the beginning, not a one-off.
